title: ErrorEnvelope
description: Standard error response envelope used by all /v1/* and legacy endpoints. See FBP-03-006 for the planned RFC 9457 Problem Details migration in /v2.

detail.description: Optional structured diagnostic data. Shape varies by error type.

status.description: HTTP status code mirrored in the body for clients that cannot inspect headers.

path.description: Request path that produced this error.

timestamp.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the error.

request_id.description: UUID v4 correlating this response to the X-Request-ID header.
